text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: But it doesn't change the result. I was naive.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I didn't realize the race would be so... tough.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I'm not sure. But I want to run again soon.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I won't settle for such a lackluster result next time
in the Derby... I want first place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian heads to the waiting room, tail
swishing vivaciously behind her.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, did you get a good picture of Narita
Brian?

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: You bet I did! I got her right as she sped up!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
I feel a little sorry for the other racers in her year.
Who would have thought that someone like her
would show up?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I recall that conversation I overheard among the
reporters the next day.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did you see the news about the last Satsuki
Sho?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I saw it. The winner's a beast. We were
aiming for the Derby too, but not anymore.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian's performance really was a shock to
us all.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Did you see that article?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Do you mean the one called, "Inches From Derby
Champion—the Astonishing Speed of Brian the
Beast"?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did you see that one racer? She was a total
beast on that final stretch.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume D
text_block_list.text:
You mean Brian, right? I wonder if she'll be at the
Derby too. I just messaged my trainer so we can
talk about it.

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Narita Brian...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, what's with all the commotion?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look over where Narita Brian is pointing to find
a long line of people waiting to see her.
choice_data_list: This must be because of the news article...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch! Busybodies. ...How annoying.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I don't have time for this right now. The next
Classic Triple Crown race is coming up. I'm going
to win the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's expectations for Narita Brian are
rising, but she is squarely focused on her next
goal—the Japanese Derby.
